title: Issue #581 live pre-payment delivery quote audit
scope: Small, reproducible audit of identical single-item baskets where NZ retailer pages exposed a delivery quote before login, payment, or order placement. No order was placed and no personal address was used.

test_locations.label: Auckland Central
test_locations.source: NZ Post address lookup returned 101/438 Queen Street, Auckland Central, Auckland 1010 as Postal\Physical.

test_locations.label: RD 2 Wairoa / Wairoa 4197
test_locations.input_used: 4197 / Wairoa; NZ Post rural validation query used 2035 State Highway 2, RD 2, Wairoa 4197
test_locations.source: NZ Post address lookup returned 2035 State Highway 2, RD 2, Wairoa 4197 as Postal.

test_locations.label: Chatham Islands
test_locations.source: Chatham Islands Council and NZ Government list Waitangi, Chatham Islands 8942 for council contact/postal details.

observations.basket: 1 x Urban Loft Louie Bath Towel, colour Platinum, SKU 1129496006, product page price $14.99
observations.quote_surface: Product page delivery postcode panel before adding to cart

quotes.result: Standard Delivery, delivery within 1-3 business days, $8.00; Express Evening Delivery, delivery tonight between 6pm and 9pm, $14.00
Rural Delivery, delivery within 5-10 business days, $10.00
Standard Delivery, delivery within 1-3 business days, note says standard excludes rural postcodes and outer islands, $8.00

observations.limitations: The postcode-only remote result conflicts with Briscoes' FAQ note that outer islands incur additional costs, so it should be treated as a pre-payment product-page quote rather than proof of final landed cost after full address validation.

observations.basket: 1 x Craftright 8m Tape Measure, I/N 5660481, product page price $4.98
observations.quote_surface: Product page delivery postcode/suburb estimator before adding to cart

quotes.result: $8 delivery fee; delivered between Thu 9 - Mon 13 Jul; single item only; delivery calculated at checkout for multiple items; available
$8 delivery fee; delivered between Thu 9 - Mon 13 Jul; single item only; delivery calculated at checkout for multiple items; available
$8 delivery fee; delivered between Thu 9 - Mon 13 Jul; single item only; delivery calculated at checkout for multiple items; available

observations.limitations: The page explicitly says the quote is for a single item only and that delivery is calculated at checkout for multiple items.

observations.basket: 1 x Number 8 Tape Measure 5m, SKU 229913, product page price $3.58
observations.quote_surface: Product page delivery location picker before adding to cart

quotes.result: Delivery - From $8.00; deliver to Auckland Central, 1010
Delivery - From $8.00; deliver to Chatham Islands, 8942

observations.limitations: The product page showed a 'From $8.00' estimate, not a final checkout fee; Mitre 10's delivery page separately says rural parcel orders under 25kg are $13.50 and that costs are calculated and displayed at checkout.

observations.product: Healtheries Vitamin C 1,000mg + Prebiotics & Probiotics 80 Tablets

quotes.input: No address accepted before next step in this run
quotes.result: Cart showed Shipping: Calculated at next step; add $80.01 to cart to get free standard shipping.

observations.limitations: The browser session did not advance to an address quote without further checkout/contact details.

observations.product: WS Photocopy Paper A4 80gsm 500 Sheet Ream
observations.basket: 1 x WS Photocopy Paper A4 80gsm 500 Sheet Ream, item no. 9418362009356, product page price $8.90
observations.quote_surface: Product page island selector before cart

quotes.result: Available in the North Island; standard delivery estimated 2-4 business days; no dollar delivery fee shown on product page.

observations.limitations: Clicking the cart after adding the item triggered Cloudflare security verification in this environment, so no metro/rural/remote checkout fee was verified.
